tasks.description: Bootstrap Go project (go mod init, create directory structure, add dependencies)
comments: Completed: go.mod initialized with github.com/aws/ai-resource-core-go
Created directories: pkg/airesource, internal/schema, internal/template, internal/types
Added dependencies: gopkg.in/yaml.v3, github.com/xeipuuv/gojsonschema, github.com/cbroglie/mustache

tasks.description: Implement Core Types (core-types.md) - Resource envelope, Kind constants, Metadata, Prompt/Promptset/Rule/Ruleset types
comments: Completed: Created pkg/airesource/{fragment,prompt,rule,resource}.go
Implemented all core types: Resource, Kind, Metadata, Prompt, Promptset, Rule, Ruleset, Fragment, Body
Added custom YAML unmarshaling for Body and BodyItem union types
Added type-safe accessors: AsPrompt, AsPromptset, AsRule, AsRuleset
Passes go build and go vet

tasks.description: Implement Error Handling (error-handling.md) - ValidationError, SchemaError, FragmentError, MultiError types
comments: Completed: Created pkg/airesource/errors.go
Implemented all error types: ValidationError, SchemaError, FragmentError, InputError, LoadError, MultiError
All types implement error interface with Error() methods
Implemented Unwrap() for error chaining (ValidationError, FragmentError, LoadError)
Implemented Unwrap() []error for MultiError (Go 1.20+)
Moved ValidationError from fragment.go to errors.go
Passes go build and go vet

tasks.description: Implement Resource Loading (resource-loading.md) - YAML/JSON parsing, multi-document support, LoadResource/LoadResources functions
comments: Completed: Created pkg/airesource/{options,version,loader}.go
Implemented LoadResource, LoadResources, LoadPrompt, LoadPromptset, LoadRule, LoadRuleset
Added LoadOptions with functional options pattern (WithMaxFileSize, etc.)
Supports YAML and JSON parsing, multi-document YAML files
Version validation with clear error messages
File size limits and safety checks
Added JSON unmarshaling to Body and BodyItem types for remarshal support
All tests pass: go test ./...
Passes go build and go vet

tasks.description: Implement Schema Validation (schema-validation.md) - Embedded JSON schemas, validator integration, pattern/enum validation
comments: Completed: Created internal/schema/{schemas.go,validator.go,validator_test.go}
Embedded JSON schemas for Prompt, Promptset, Rule, Ruleset
Implemented ValidateSchema function with gojsonschema integration
Returns SchemaError with field paths for validation failures
Returns MultiError for multiple validation errors
Integrated schema validation into LoadResource and LoadResources
Added JSON tags to Resource and Metadata structs for proper marshaling
All tests pass: go test ./...
Passes go build and go vet

tasks.description: Implement Fragment Input Validation (fragment-input-validation.md) - InputDefinition to JSON Schema conversion, type validation
Implement Semantic Validation (semantic-validation.md) - Fragment reference checking, collection validation, scope validation
Implement Fragment Resolution (fragment-resolution.md) - Body type detection, Mustache rendering, ResolveBody function
Implement Conformance Testing (conformance-testing.md) - Test fixture discovery, valid/invalid case testing, CI/CD integration
